tldr_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-5.6並推出ChatGPT Work智能代理，Anthropic揭示Claude的內部「思考空間」。
tldr_en: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 and ChatGPT Work agent; Anthropic reveals Claude's hidden reasoning space.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出GPT-5.6模型，成為Microsoft 365 Copilot首選
items.title_en: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 as preferred model for Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布新一代GPT-5.6模型，已獲得川普政府批准進行公開發布。該模型成為Microsoft 365 Copilot的首選引擎，將在Word、Excel、PowerPoint等應用中提供更強大的AI能力。CEO Sam Altman稱其為「迄今最優秀的模型」。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has released GPT-5.6 with Trump administration approval for public rollout. The model becomes the preferred engine for Microsoft 365 Copilot, delivering stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint and other apps. CEO Sam Altman called it "the best model we have ever produced."

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出ChatGPT Work智能代理，可獨立執行數小時工作
items.title_en: OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Work agent capable of independent multi-hour tasks
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出ChatGPT Work，這是一個能在用戶應用和文件間採取行動的智能代理，可獨立完成工作數小時直到任務完成。此舉標誌著OpenAI從對話式AI向自主工作代理的轉變，同時宣布關閉其實驗性AI瀏覽器ChatGPT Atlas。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduced ChatGPT Work, an AI agent that can take independent action across apps and files, working for hours to complete tasks without user intervention. This marks a shift from conversational AI to autonomous work agents, while the company is shutting down its experimental ChatGPT Atlas browser.

items.title_zh: Anthropic發現Claude內部「隱藏思考空間」，透視AI推理過程
items.title_en: Anthropic discovers hidden reasoning space inside Claude, revealing how AI thinks
items.summary_zh: Anthropic開發了名為Jacobian lens的工具，首次清晰展示大語言模型內部如何處理概念和任務。研究發現包括尋常到令人不安的各種現象，為理解AI黑箱提供了新途徑，有助於改進AI安全性和可解釋性。
items.summary_en: Anthropic developed the Jacobian lens tool, providing the clearest view yet into how large language models process concepts and tasks internally. Findings range from mundane to unsettling, offering new insights into AI reasoning and potentially improving AI safety and interpretability.

items.title_zh: AI初創Lyzr用自家AI代理籌募1億美元融資
items.title_en: AI startup Lyzr raises $100M funding round using its own AI agent
items.summary_zh: 企業AI代理初創公司Lyzr透過其自主開發的AI代理執行整個融資流程，成功籌募1億美元。此舉被視為該公司產品實力的證明，展示AI代理在複雜商業流程中的實用價值。
items.summary_en: Enterprise AI agent startup Lyzr successfully raised $100 million by having its own AI agent manage the entire fundraising process. The accomplishment serves as proof of the product's capabilities and demonstrates practical value of AI agents in complex business workflows.

items.title_zh: OpenAI高管Fidji Simo因病假超期辭去第二把手職位
items.title_en: OpenAI's No. 2 executive Fidji Simo steps down after extended medical leave
items.summary_zh: OpenAI首席運營官Fidji Simo在醫療假期超出預期後辭去全職職位，造成公司領導真空。此時正值OpenAI計劃IPO並與Anthropic競爭企業市場的關鍵時期，凸顯公司的人事挑戰。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's COO Fidji Simo stepped down from her full-time role after extended medical leave, creating a leadership vacuum during critical growth phase. The departure comes as OpenAI eyes a potential IPO and races to compete with Anthropic in the enterprise market.

items.title_zh: Google推出AI廣告標籤，用戶可查看廣告是否由AI生成或編輯
items.title_en: Google adds transparency labels showing if ads were made or edited with AI
items.summary_zh: Google在Google Search、Google Discover和YouTube新增「使用AI生成或編輯」標籤，透過My Ad Center讓用戶了解廣告製作方式。此舉提升廣告透明度，回應日益增加的AI生成內容問題。
items.summary_en: Google introduced transparency labels in My Ad Center across Search, Discover, and YouTube showing whether ads were created or edited using AI. The move addresses growing concerns about AI-generated content and enhances advertiser accountability.

items.title_zh: Microsoft利用AI強化Windows更新，每月安全補丁將增加
items.title_en: Microsoft uses AI to accelerate Windows security updates, increasing patch frequency
items.summary_zh: Microsoft宣布利用AI「提早識別潛在問題」，使每次安全更新包含更多修補。隨著駭客愈來愈多使用AI，這一舉措旨在提升系統安全性，但也意味著用戶將面臨更頻繁的補丁更新。
items.summary_en: Microsoft announced it's using AI to identify security issues earlier, resulting in higher volumes of fixes per security release. As hackers increasingly leverage AI, this approach aims to improve security, though users will face more frequent patches.

items.title_zh: 機器人手術遠距遙控完成豬隻手術，標誌醫療AI新里程
items.title_en: Surgeons remotely control humanoid robots to perform world-first pig surgery
items.summary_zh: 醫生遠端操控人形機器人成功在活豬身上完成世界首例手術，這是人形機器人在醫療領域臨床應用的關鍵前驅測試。實驗展示AI與機器人在精密醫療程序中的可行性，可能改變未來遠距手術模式。
items.summary_en: Surgeons successfully remotely controlled humanoid robots to perform the first-ever surgery on live pigs, a crucial preclinical test for robot-assisted medical procedures. The experiment demonstrates the feasibility of AI-powered robots in precision surgery and could transform telemedicine.

items.title_zh: OpenAI因在版權訴訟中隱藏日誌可能面臨制裁
items.title_en: OpenAI may face sanctions for hiding ChatGPT logs in copyright lawsuit with NYT
items.summary_zh: 法院指控OpenAI在紐約時報版權訴訟中隱瞞、刪除ChatGPT日誌，偽稱無法搜索訓練數據。此舉可能面臨法院制裁，凸顯公司在AI訓練透明度和法律合規的問題。
items.summary_en: OpenAI faces potential sanctions for allegedly hiding and deleting ChatGPT logs in its copyright battle with the New York Times, falsely claiming inability to search training data. The incident highlights ongoing issues with AI training transparency and legal compliance.

items.title_zh: 美伊在哈米尼葬禮前交火，中東局勢升溫
items.title_en: US and Iran exchange fire as Khamenei is buried, Middle East tensions escalate
items.summary_zh: 伊朗前最高領袖哈米尼下葬前，美伊爆發新一輪軍事衝突。美軍對伊朗核電廠周邊實施空襲，伊朗則攻擊美國盟國，導致荷莫茲海峽船舶通行量大幅下降，威脅全球能源供應。
items.summary_en: Fresh fighting erupted between the US and Iran as Khamenei was being buried. US airstrikes targeted sites near Iranian nuclear facilities while Iran attacked US-backed regional allies, causing a sharp decline in ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz and threatening global energy supplies.
